description_long: This figure depicts a humanoid adult with an unnaturally elongated right arm and a partially deformed left arm, both of which appear to be stretched far beyond normal human proportions. The skin is a deep, uniform purple, and the face is expressionless with pronounced, hollow eyes. The figure is shirtless, revealing a stitched seam running vertically down the torso, suggesting a patchwork or reanimated appearance. It wears simple, cropped pants secured with a white belt, and its feet are bare, with toes clearly defined. The overall form is slender and slightly hunched, with exaggerated limb proportions giving it an unsettling, otherworldly presence. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with subtle shading to accentuate musculature and anatomical details.
description: A humanoid adult with deep purple skin, elongated arms, and a stitched torso, wearing cropped pants and a white belt. The figure has a smooth, slightly glossy surface and an unsettling, unnatural appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the elongated right arm, stitched torso, and both arms in a relaxed, slightly bent position.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the extreme length of the right arm, which extends far behind the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the white belt, and the right arm curving outward and backward.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the stretched right arm extending forward and the left arm's deformation.
attribute_posture: standing with arms extended and slightly bent
